mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT r.role_key FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1 AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != '' AND m.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0
SELECT dept_name FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0 AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0 AND id != #{excludeId}
